description: Single denied claim with CARC code, reason, and appeal deadline.
scripted_rep_turns: Provider services, can I have your NPI please?
Thanks. I'm looking at that claim now. Unfortunately it was denied.
It was denied under code CO-45, charges exceed the fee schedule allowable amount. You have until April 30th to file an appeal.
My name is Marcus and the reference number is AET-REF-77821.

claims.denial_reason_description: charges exceed fee schedule allowable amount
